messages.content: {"2":"","UserId":"4e6dc755-3acf-48f9-961b-bb5a214343a8","Status":"Analyzed","Type":"Lab Report","promptvalue":"You are a medical document classification assistant.  Analyze the uploaded file carefully and classify it into exactly ONE of the following categories:  - Lab reports - Wearables - Health records - Patient intake - Encounter notes  Instructions: - Read the full document content. - Determine the single best matching category. - Return ONLY the category name. - Do not provide explanations, confidence scores, JSON, formatting, or extra text. - Output must exactly match one of the category names above.","isfilesavevalue":"yes","":"","doumentupload":"https://ncameodemostorage.blob.core.windows.net/ncameo/wiaipqkyiohiiaxfiles/-8584216420249608858Document_2.pdf","Notes":"","doumentupload_name":"Document_2.pdf","doumentupload_url":"https://ncameodemostorage.blob.core.windows.net/ncameo/wiaipqkyiohiiaxfiles/-8584216420249608858Document_2.pdf","createdby":"56211ac7-c7a0-44a5-9b53-3af4b04bad7a","createddate":"2026-05-28T10:40:32.929Z","updatedby":"56211ac7-c7a0-44a5-9b53-3af4b04bad7a","updateddate":"2026-05-28T10:40:32.929Z","gocameomodel":"PatientDocument","id":"f1da6f3c-47f1-4ce8-af6e-571149c2631f","createdate":"2026-05-28T10:41:02.9777191+00:00","_rid":"xqw0APUgK5L0BQAAAAAAAA==","_self":"dbs/xqw0AA==/colls/xqw0APUgK5I=/docs/xqw0APUgK5L0BQAAAAAAAA==/","_etag":"\"00001323-0000-0700-0000-6a181bbf0000\"","_attachments":"attachments/","_ts":1779964863,"aiagents":[],"highlightDataCard":[]}
